mapper.insert: INSERT INTO DDD_REPORT ( report_number, reporter_user_number, reported_user_number, apply_number, report_reason, report_date ) VALUES ( SEQ_REPORT.NEXTVAL, #{reporterUserNumber}, #{reportedUserNumber}, #{applyNumber}, #{reportReason}, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE ddd_user_common SET common_report_count = NVL(common_report_count, 0) + 1 WHERE user_number = #{value}
